productName: HTE Honey - Peanut Butter Kush - Peanut Butter Kush - .7g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Peanut Butter Kush and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a smooth, sweet honey flavor, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
